Transfer Points / Stars

Loading…

Record Daily Score

Star Transfer

Transfer stars between students using the selected Date and Month above.

Star -> VETO Conversion

Convert stars of selected student at fixed ratio: 5 stars = 1 VETO.

Points -> Star Conversion

Convert points to stars for selected student. Rule: 150 points = 1 star. Student must have minimum points.

Points Transfer

Transfer points between students for the current day. Post holders can transfer to any student; normal students can only donate to their PP/DPP. PP/DPP can transfer between party members.

Tip: Saving a score for the same student and date will update the existing entry.

Directly amend Stars and VETOs for any past month. Saved rows are flagged as admin-locked and will never be overwritten by any sync or reconciliation.

The system automatically saves rolling snapshots before each write (up to 10, throttled every 30 s). Use this to restore a previous state if data was accidentally corrupted.

Party Presidents

One President per party · Managed via Party tab
Party President Roll Selection Tenure End Status Actions
Loading...
Manual role-grant VETOs apply to the current month and override the automatic total for that student.

Global Vote Settings

These values drive the backend vote calculations directly. Change them once here and the scoreboard, office views, and vote-power math will follow.

Setting Value Notes
Teacher vote bonus Used in teacher vote power formula: (highest student vote power + bonus) / 2.
Leader VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Leadership posts labelled as Leader.
Co-Leader VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Co-Leader posts.
LoP VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Leader of Opposition.
DWI VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Discipline / Welfare post.
CR VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Class Representative posts.
PP VETO grant Default monthly role grant for Party President posts.
DPP VETO grant Reserved for future use. It is stored, but the current backend does not award DPP role VETOs yet.

Role-Grant VETOs

Update the monthly role-grant total for each active post holder. Leave the value blank and save to restore the automatic default.

Student Active Roles Default Manual Grant Effective Action

Teacher Profiles

Add teachers so they appear in teacher voting.

Name Roll/ID Subject Active Actions
Loading...

👩‍🏫 Teacher Voting Booth Final Round

Teachers cast their votes after student voting. Vote power = (highest student vote power + 5) ÷ 2 — group-scoped for CR posts, global for all other posts. 🔒 Results hidden until conclusion.

📊 Student Voting Summary
-
🎯 Candidate Roll Class Group Action
Select teacher & post

Live Vote Counts

Count-only summary — shows how many votes each candidate has received. Voter identities are not shown.

Voting History

Admin-only historical result view for votes recorded in the current month.

Select a post to load voting months.

Undo Teacher Votes Admin Only

Select a post to see all recorded teacher votes. Use Remove to undo a specific vote. This action cannot be undone automatically — it removes the vote from storage.

Submit Appeal

Admin Actions

Admins cannot submit appeals. Use this panel to review and act on appeals from teachers and students.

 Connected Devices Log

                

                    Every login from any device is recorded here with device name, OS, browser, IP and a persistent
                    Device UUID (browser-local ID).
                    Note: Browser security prevents reading MAC addresses; the UUID uniquely identifies each browser instance instead.

 Ledger Forensic Integrity & Recovery

                
If the system crashes or the JSON file gets corrupted/restored, you can reconstruct and synchronize the full JSON ledger using the ACID-compliant SQLite transactions database.
